goal: Fix header padding and text sizes on Dashboard and History
summary: Phase 2 completed successfully. Dashboard and History pages now have tightened header padding (pb-4 mb-6) and all arbitrary text sizes converted to standard Tailwind utilities. Templates page was also updated during this phase per user request. Build passes cleanly.
stepSummaries:
1. Dashboard: tighten header padding pb-6 mb-8 → pb-4 mb-6, convert text-[10px] → text-xs [verified]
  2. History: tighten header padding pb-6 mb-8 → pb-4 mb-6, convert text-[10px] → text-xs [verified]
  3. Run build to verify no errors [verified]

gateVerdicts.rationale: All 3 steps had real verification: steps 1-2 used grep to confirm zero text-[...] remainders and header padding changes, step 3 ran npm run build which passed with exit 0. The same build also validates the templates changes made during this phase.
gateVerdicts.evidence: npm run build exited 0. grep verification confirmed pb-4 mb-6 on dashboard, history, and templates; zero text-[ on all three files.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to fix header padding and text sizes on Dashboard and History. Outputs: all three pages (dashboard, history, templates) now use pb-4 mb-6 headers and text-xs badges. Build passes confirming no regressions.
gateVerdicts.evidence: dashboard/page.tsx:40 pb-4 mb-6; history/page.tsx:90 pb-4 mb-6; templates/page.tsx:44 pb-4 mb-6. No text-[ patterns remain in any of these files.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in Phase 2. User additionally asked for templates page during Phase 2 execution; it was completed inline with the same changes (header padding + text-xs). Chat page has no standard header pattern or text-[...] values, so no changes needed.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All changes completed and verified. Phase 2 scope fully satisfied.
